headline: $8M Crypto Ransom Suspect Extradited to US Authorities

article.title: Teen ‘Scattered Spider’ suspect extradited to US over $8M crypto ransom
article.summary: Peter Stokes, 19, has been charged in the US for allegedly taking part in a hacking group’s unsuccessful $8 million crypto ransom scheme.

headline: Meta's AI Growth Slows 30% Amid Market Volatility

article.title: AI agent development hasn’t accelerated as expected, Zuckerberg says
article.summary: Mark Zuckerberg’s comments came on the same day that Meta expanded its Meta Business Agent globally for businesses on Instagram, Messenger and WhatsApp.

headline: ECB Exit Looms Amid Lagarde's 2024 Politics Bid

article.title: Lagarde Won’t Exclude Early ECB Exit to Enter French Politics
article.summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde said she won’t rule out leaving her current position early to participate in French politics.

headline: Japan Wage Gains Exceed 5% for Third Year

article.title: Japan’s 2026 Wage Talks Result in Third Year of Gains Above 5%
article.summary: Japan’s annual wage negotiations concluded with average pay gains topping 5% for a third year, underscoring the economy’s resilience and reinforcing the Bank of Japan’s stance to keep raising interest rates.

headline: OpenAI Sells $42B Stake to US Government
